beats.activity: Wake up, shower, and make a quick breakfast with coffee
beats.reasoning: Start the day with energy at home before the heavy rain window.

beats.activity: Grab groceries and essentials for the workday (umbrellas, snacks)
beats.reasoning: Running a short errand early helps avoid getting stuck later in heavy rain.

beats.activity: Drive to work and park near the office entrance
beats.reasoning: Commute accommodates wet roads while SR-520 closure may affect some routes.

beats.activity: Deep work sprint: review tickets, write and test features
beats.reasoning: Morning focus works well even with rain disrupting the city.

beats.activity: Coffee break and quick team check-in in the lobby cafe area
beats.reasoning: Short refresh before the next block of meetings while keeping time tight.
Collaborative work fits midday while heavy rain continues.

beats.location_name: Redmond Town Center Food Court (North Campus Way)
beats.reasoning: Staying near campus avoids traffic during SR-520 eastbound closure (9am-noon) effects and heavy rain.

beats.activity: Work block: implement bug fixes and run CI tests
beats.reasoning: Efficient afternoon work while weather remains heavy through 2pm.

beats.activity: Wrap up tasks and tidy up the day’s notes
beats.reasoning: Quick end-of-day buffer right after the heavy rain window ends.

beats.activity: Commute back home by car in lighter traffic
beats.reasoning: Return home before evening plans while avoiding any remaining road disruptions.

beats.activity: Relax at home and read tech news / unwind
beats.reasoning: A calm decompression after a rainy commute-heavy morning.

beats.activity: Gym workout: strength training and light cardio
beats.reasoning: A fun, social-feeling workout helps Priyanshu recharge after work.

beats.activity: Drive back toward Redmond and stop for a takeout snack/tea
beats.reasoning: Keeps the schedule smooth and avoids long waits during evening.

beats.activity: Casual early dinner at home (simple homemade meal)
beats.reasoning: Staying in keeps things cozy after a long rain-soaked day.

beats.activity: Call a friend and catch up (low-key fun)
beats.reasoning: Matches his nice, fun-loving personality with an easy social touch.

beats.activity: Evening hobby time: build a small side project and tinker
beats.reasoning: An engineer-friendly unwind that doesn’t require travel.

beats.activity: Plan tomorrow lightly and set out clothes/gear
beats.reasoning: A practical reset so the next day starts smoothly.

beats.activity: Wind down: light reading and relaxing music
beats.reasoning: Helps transition from work mode to sleep after a packed day.

beats.activity: Get ready for bed and sleep
beats.reasoning: Ends the day at home with a proper bedtime before midnight.
